productDisplayName: Reebok Men's Winning Stride White Shoe
description: You asked for it, you got it: the muscle toning shoe for men. These reebok Winning Stride walking shoes help you stretch your limits on your daily walks. Compared to a traditional shoe, the EasyTone Stride encourages more activation in the glutes, hamstrings and calves. Ideal for walking and everyday activities. EasyTone patented micro instability sole technology builds up to 28% more strength in the glutes and up to 11% more in the hamstrings and calves. SmoothFit seamless liner minimizes friction and gives you irritation free walks. Removable PU sockliner for superior cushioning, accommodates orthotics. So keep enjoying those healthy walks with these reebok Winning Stride shoes. Upper Synthetic upper with reinforced synthetic stitched overlays for maximum durability Perforations on the forefoot region for breathability Central lacing system for comfort Fit Lightly padded tongue and collar for snug fit Mesh tongue for maximum breathability Midsole DMX Foam midsole that delivers a cushioned ride in a consistently longer lasting ride Removable footbed to support orthotics Arched footbed for ergonomic fit Trustic unit made of durable rubber with vacuum scoop extended to the sides for complete inner arch support Outsole Separate heel and toe unit for superior grip on rough surfaces Grooved reinforcements below the heel and forefoot units for maximum traction Dual lugs on the outsole provide excellent grip Shoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
